ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trim_levels" (
  "trim_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trim level */,
  "trim_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the trim level */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trim_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "option_packages" (
  "option_package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option package */,
  "option_package_name" TEXT /* Name of the option package */,
  "trim_level_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the trim level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engines" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine */,
  "engine_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the engine */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission used in the vehicle */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, marketing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each trim level
Unique identifier for each option package
Foreign key referencing the trim level
Type of transmission used in the vehicle
Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, marketing)
Permission granted to the user (e.g., read, write, delete)
